faqs.question: How can I be sure the property is legally verified?
faqs.answer: Every listing undergoes title search, lien review, and compliance checks before it appears on our site.

faqs.question: Why work with agents that have passed a full legal check?
faqs.answer: Our advisors are vetted for licensing, transaction history, and regulatory compliance.

faqs.question: Can I buy property if I'm not from this country?
faqs.answer: Yes. We support international buyers with documentation guidance and local legal partners.

faqs.question: Do I need to be present in person for the paperwork?
faqs.answer: Many steps can be handled remotely via power of attorney and digital signing where permitted.

faqs.question: How long does the whole process take?
faqs.answer: Typical transactions range from 30–90 days depending on financing, inspections, and jurisdiction.

faqs.question: I'm afraid of losing my money — how is this protected?
faqs.answer: Funds are held in regulated escrow accounts with milestone-based releases tied to verified milestones.

faqs.question: Can I sell the property I buy?
faqs.answer: Yes. We also provide resale advisory and market positioning for owners when you're ready to exit.

faqs.question: I don't understand legal details — who will explain everything?
faqs.answer: Your dedicated advisor and our legal team walk you through each document in plain language.
